notes: 13 available. OUT: Thacher Knight #20, Jon Sorenson, Kyle Doherty, Luke McArdle. Klatt & Joe McLean split the 7 innings 4/3 (Klatt innings 1-4, Joe innings 5-7). With Sorenson out, Coulombe is the primary catcher (Bruno/Cheever back him up). Perry DiLibero subs in at LCF for Andrew Amann in inning 4. No player sits two innings in a row. Batting order: base-hitters set the table (Sang, Klatt), run producers in the middle (Amann 3, DiLibero cleanup, Marks 5).

opponent_lineup.source: No 2025 scouting data (Falcons are not in the 2025 opponent dataset).

rules: VALIDATION RULE: Each inning has exactly 10 positions (P,C,1B,2B,3B,SS,LF,LCF,RCF,RF), one player per position. No gaps, no duplicates.
Pitching split 4/3: Eric Klatt pitches innings 1-4, Joe McLean pitches innings 5-7.
Dennis Marks at SS all 7 (only shortstop). Andrew Amann at LCF (rests inning 4 - Perry DiLibero subs at LCF).
3 sits per inning (13 available). No one sits more than twice; Amann & Marks sit at most once; NO player sits two innings in a row.
Batting order = on-base/AVG at the top (leadoff Sang Lee .727, 2-hole Klatt .706 contact), power in the RBI spots (Amann 3rd, DiLibero cleanup, Marks 5th).

grid.why: Leadoff: team-best .727 AVG/.727 OBP, 7 of 8 hits singles - pure table-setter. Plays 1B (sits inn 1, 3).
Two-hole: .706 AVG, 11 singles, elite contact to move the leadoff man. Pitches innings 1-4; 3B inn 6.
Three-hole: best all-around bat (2.286 OPS, .714 AVG, 11 RBI). LCF; rests inn 4 (Perry subs).
Cleanup: team-high 14 RBI and 4 HR. Best LF; takes LCF inning 4 when Amann rests.
Five-hole: 14 RBI, 3 HR. Only shortstop, plays all 7 (anchor).
2.000 OPS pop. Best 1B; also covers LF/RCF. Plays 5 (sits inn 5, 7).
.636 AVG, 7 RBI. Pitches innings 5-7; plays 2B when not on the mound. Sits inn 2, 4.
.524 AVG. Best 3B. Plays 6 (sits inn 6 when Klatt takes the corner).
Right-side OF, second catcher. Plays 5 (sits inn 1, 6).
Right-side OF / catcher depth. Plays 5 (sits inn 4, 7).
